summary.key_theme: 市場正密切關注 7 月 22 日的財報發布，多空雙方在 AI 變現潛力與 IBM 財報預警引發的軟體支出放緩擔憂之間拉鋸。

bullish.title: Oppenheimer Maintains Outperform on ServiceNow, Raises Price Target to $140
bullish.reason: 分析師 Brian Schwartz 維持優於大盤評級並上調目標價，顯示對公司長期成長動能的信心。

bullish.title: ServiceNow: AI Is An Opportunity, Not A Threat
bullish.reason: 指出 26 倍的預期本益比具吸引力，且 AI 變現能力將成為未來成長的核心驅動力。

bullish.title: ServiceNow Seen Well Positioned for Q2
bullish.reason: BNP Paribas 認為保守的財測指引與聯邦政府部門需求改善，有利於公司在 Q2 財報中繳出優於預期的成績。

bullish.title: ServiceNow (NOW) Is Raising Its AI Targets As Investors Shift Toward Software
bullish.reason: 市場資金正從 AI 硬體基礎設施轉向應用層軟體，有利於 ServiceNow 的估值修復。

bullish.title: Tenon Expands Marketing Automation into the ServiceNow AI Platform
bullish.reason: 透過與 Tenon 的整合，擴展了 ServiceNow AI 平台的生態系統與應用場景。

bullish.title: C1Secure Launches SmartRAMP 20x, a ServiceNow-Native Platform
bullish.reason: 強化了 ServiceNow 在聯邦政府合規市場的競爭力與市占率。

bullish.title: Why Is ServiceNow Stock Gaining Monday?
bullish.reason: 在科技股普遍疲軟時展現出 4% 的抗跌與反彈力道，顯示市場買盤支撐。

bullish.title: Don’t Miss the Surprising Signal to Buy ServiceNow Before July 22
bullish.reason: 期權市場交易訊號顯示在財報前夕有潛在的買入動能。

bearish.title: ADBE, CRM, NOW, MSFT: Software Stocks Fall After IBM Warns Clients Shifting Spending To Servers, Cybersecurity
bearish.reason: IBM 的財報預警引發市場對企業軟體支出放緩的擔憂，導致整個軟體板塊出現連帶下跌。

bearish.title: ServiceNow vs. Atlassian: Which Cloud Software Stock Has an Edge?
bearish.reason: 指出 ServiceNow 面臨利潤率壓力，且相較於 Atlassian 在估值與 AI 動能上略顯劣勢。

bearish.title: NOW (PSE:NOW) Stock Trades At A Premium Despite A 76% Fall
bearish.reason: 儘管股價長期大幅下跌，但基於廣泛的估值指標，該股目前仍被視為昂貴，存在修正風險。

bearish.title: ServiceNow (NOW) Earnings Expected to Grow: What to Know Ahead of Next Week's Release
bearish.reason: 分析指出公司目前缺乏財報超預期的關鍵驅動因素，市場預期偏向保守。

bearish.title: Citigroup Maintains Buy on ServiceNow, Lowers Price Target to $156
bearish.reason: 雖然維持買入評級，但下調目標價反映了對短期成長動能的謹慎態度。

bearish.title: ServiceNow Stock Falls in Sympathy With IBM After Disappointing Preliminary Q2 Results
bearish.reason: 與 IBM 的連動下跌，反映了市場對同業財報表現的敏感度極高。

neutral.title: UBS Maintains Neutral on ServiceNow, Raises Price Target to $115
neutral.reason: UBS 維持中立評級，上調目標價僅反映市場估值調整，並未改變對公司基本面的看法。

neutral.title: Should You Buy ServiceNow Stock Before July 22?
neutral.reason: 僅提醒投資人關注 7 月 22 日的財報更新，未給出明確買賣建議。

neutral.title: Can ServiceNow (NOW) Trade At A Premium After A 46% Drop?
neutral.reason: 探討股價下跌後的估值合理性，未有明確結論。

neutral.title: ServiceNow Gets Constructive Earnings Setup
neutral.reason: 與 BNP Paribas 的觀點重複，強調財報前的準備工作。

neutral.title: Adobe, ServiceNow, and Appian Stocks Trade Down, What You Need To Know
neutral.reason: 報導軟體股下跌現象，內容與 IBM 預警相關新聞重複。

neutral.title: Missing ServiceNow's AI Pivot Could Be Your Biggest Mistake
neutral.reason: 重申 AI 轉型的重要性，但屬於長期觀點，對短期股價影響有限。
